Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(sync): always scan BASE_DIRS + TARGET_DIRS to prevent data loss

_get_my_files() relied on in-memory _my_organized_codes to decide
whether to include TARGET_DIRS in sync reports. After agent restart,
this set was empty, causing full sync to report only BASE_DIRS files.
The server then deleted all TARGET_DIRS entries (organized files) from
user_files.

Always scan both directories so organized files survive reconnects.

commit.message:
Rename release workflow to force GitHub to re-register it

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Ch3 v1.2.3: attribution corrections (Bishop adversarial review)

- Position-persistence foil: separate Parfit's diagnostic role (why
  position-persistence feels compelling and fails structurally) from
  Scanlon's normative role (why accrued obligations are genuinely binding).
  "Parfit-grounded chain-global is the right category because it tracks
  what actually grounds the obligation" → Parfit identifies the structural
  parallel; Scanlon establishes the normative ground. Consistent with
  Ch4 v1.5.1 correction.

- Authority-continuity: remove "hasn't entered the chain" (Parfitian
  chain-entry language) and replace with Scanlonian epistemic-access
  framing: "cannot be held to commitments they had no epistemic access to"
  — a normative-fairness point about what can be justified to them, not a
  Relation-R formation condition. Consistent with Ch4 v1.5.0 correction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add interactive sessions, fix session status and delegation output (#179)

## Summary

- **Interactive sessions (Item 11)**: File-based ask_user bridge lets
GUI-launched agents ask questions via a chat panel in the browser.
Includes bridge handler, respond endpoint, SSE detection, ChatPanel
component, and interactive mode toggle in LaunchDialog.
- **Fix premature "completed" status**: `_parse_trace()` used
`delegate_end` (which always has `parent_span=None`) to determine
session exit_code, causing sessions to show "completed" after the first
delegation. Now `session_end` carries `exit_code` and `summary`
directly.
- **Fix delegation output not returned to caller**: `DelegateResult`
gRPC response now includes the sub-agent's actual output in the `output`
Struct field, not just the summary.
- **Fix run_id variable shadowing** in `cli.py` causing new sessions to
reuse stale session IDs.
- **Fix `memory: "none"` crash**: String `"none"` was truthy, causing
`resolve_memory("none", ...)` to fail.
- **Add missing `schedule_id` migration** for existing databases.

## Test plan

- [x] CLI tests pass (510 passed)
- [x] GUI tests pass (146 passed)
- [x] Frontend TypeScript compiles cleanly
- [ ] Launch interactive session from GUI, verify Chat tab appears
- [ ] Verify session status stays "running" during active delegations
- [ ] Verify delegation output appears in denden response JSON

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

commit.message:
Fix Bug #74: UnboundLocalError on risk_config blocks ALL trades

Per-trader risk_config override (Bug #64 Phase 2, commit 924e7fc) assigned
risk_config = _rc at line 2697, making Python treat risk_config as local
for the entire do_trade_for_account() function. Fallback reads at lines
2656/2663/2676 accessed risk_config BEFORE that assignment → UnboundLocalError
on every single trade. Same pattern as Bug #50 (datetime shadowing).

Fix: save outer scope to _outer_risk_config before the override block.

fix(organize): invalidate scan cache after successful ORGANIZE

reconnect would hit the cache and report files still in BASE_DIRS.

commit.message:
Production hardening: fix timezone math, add validation, rate limit calls, dedup everywhere

Appointment fixes:
- Fix broken localToUTC conversion in bookAppointment (was treating local time as UTC)
- Fix broken timezone offset in rescheduleAppointment (same bug)
- Fix conflict detection: duration was in minutes but added as ms (missed overlaps)
- Fix endTime in reschedule: was adding raw minutes instead of ms
- Add past date validation (reject appointments in the past)
- Add duration validation (min 5 min, max 8 hours)
- Add Saturday/Sunday to weekday parser
- Reject invalid dates instead of silently defaulting to tomorrow

Call rate limiting:
- Increase outbound call dedup window from 30s to 5 minutes
- Add rate limiting at initiateCall() level (the single choke point all paths use)
- All 10+ code paths to initiateCall() now rate-limited per phone number

Notification dedup:
- Add 10-minute lead dedup to promo webhook (had zero protection)

commit.message:
feat: barge-in support + prevent AI from interrupting caller

- Caller can always interrupt AI: speech_started clears Twilio buffer
  and sets elevenlabs_interrupted event to cancel audio sleep immediately
- AI cannot interrupt caller: caller_speaking flag blocks new AI response
  generation while caller is speaking; AI mid-stream stops if caller speaks
- speech_stopped clears caller_speaking and resets interrupted event

fix: PDF report - 6 refinements per user feedback

* Add pure HTML/JS index.html for GitHub Pages deployment

Convert Streamlit app (app.py) to standalone HTML/JS that runs directly
on GitHub Pages without any server or Python dependencies.

Features:
- Complete thermal calculation engine ported from Python to JavaScript
- All 5 tabs: Component Setup, Detailed Analysis, Visual Report, 3D Simulation, Sensitivity Analysis
- Responsive sidebar with all parameter controls
- Plotly.js charts: margin overview, power breakdown, 3D model with thermal gradient fins
- Sensitivity analysis: single variable sweep + tornado chart
- Project I/O: JSON save/load (compatible with Streamlit version format)
- Loading screen for initial render
- Dark sidebar + clean main content area design

Calculation engine includes:
- calcHValue (h_conv + h_rad with tanh/sqrt models)
- calcFinCount (tree-planting algorithm with 0.001mm tolerance)
- calcThermalResistance (Copper Coin, Thermal Via, Solder, TIM)
- computeAll (full pipeline: thermal resistance -> bottleneck -> sizing -> weight -> DRC)
- Tc/Tj distinction for PWR/DDR components

https://claude.ai/code/session_01NdcxvwbkBpWGsYcNQeGtW3

* Fix all UI issues: Chinese labels, tooltips, Firebase, AI section, charts

- Restore all Chinese labels with icons matching original Streamlit version
- Add column tooltips (title attributes) on Tab1 and Tab2 table headers
- Add Firebase JS SDK integration with Firestore component library
  (save/load/delete components from rf_library, digital_library, pwr_library)
- Restore AI rendering section below 3D simulation tab
  (prompt generator, copy button, step-by-step guide)
- Fix sensitivity analysis bar charts: grouped bars (not overlapping)
  using barmode:'group' with offsetgroup for volume/weight
- Add detail data tables (collapsible) below sensitivity analysis charts
- Add component library quick-select with save/delete buttons per row
- Restore all original KPI card labels in Chinese

https://claude.ai/code/session_01NdcxvwbkBpWGsYcNQeGtW3

* Fix UI issues: login page, chart fullscreen, color scales, Tornado layout, KPI fonts

- Add password login page matching original Streamlit UI
- Enable Plotly modebar/fullscreen on all charts (Visual Report, 3D, Sensitivity, Tornado)
- Fix color scale visibility on power and margin charts
- Fix Tornado chart title/label overlap with improved margins
- Improve KPI card font styling with rounded font family
- Fix sensitivity sweep bar chart grouping (Volume & Weight)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01NdcxvwbkBpWGsYcNQeGtW3

* Fix login page layout to full width matching original Streamlit version

- Remove max-width constraints on login header, input box, and info cards
- Login page now stretches horizontally to fill the entire viewport

https://claude.ai/code/session_01NdcxvwbkBpWGsYcNQeGtW3

* Add fullscreen button to all Plotly charts using browser Fullscreen API

- Define custom fullscreen modebar button with expand icon
- Add fullscreen button to all chart configs (Visual Report, 3D, Sensitivity, Tornado)
- Clicking the button enters browser fullscreen mode for that chart

https://claude.ai/code/session_01NdcxvwbkBpWGsYcNQeGtW3

* Fix chart resize on tab switch and fullscreen exit

- Trigger Plotly.Plots.resize after switching tabs so charts fill width
- Add fullscreenchange listener to resize charts back to normal on exit

https://claude.ai/code/session_01NdcxvwbkBpWGsYcNQeGtW3

* Re-render Tab0 after Firebase library loads so DB dropdown shows immediately

initFirebase() is async so compLib was still empty when renderTab0() first ran.
Now renderTab0() is called again after libraries are loaded from Firestore.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01NdcxvwbkBpWGsYcNQeGtW3

* Fix chart size not restoring after fullscreen exit

Save original inline width/height before entering fullscreen, then restore
them on exit. Also clear any inline dimensions Plotly may have set on the
gd element before calling resize.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01NdcxvwbkBpWGsYcNQeGtW3

* Rewrite fullscreen: use wrapper element instead of fullscreening chart directly

Move the chart into a temporary wrapper div for fullscreen, then move it
back to its original position on exit. Use Plotly.relayout with explicit
width/height for fullscreen, then null to restore autosize on exit.
This avoids Plotly's internal inline styles persisting after exit.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01NdcxvwbkBpWGsYcNQeGtW3

* Fix fullscreen exit: clear inline dimensions and dispatch resize event

After moving chart back to its flex container, clear all inline
width/height on Plotly's internal elements before calling relayout.
Then dispatch a window resize event so ALL responsive charts in the
flex layout recalculate their dimensions properly.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01NdcxvwbkBpWGsYcNQeGtW3

* Fix flex layout distortion: zero-width element before relayout

After moving chart back into flex container, temporarily set width:0
and min-width:0 so the element doesn't influence flex space distribution.
Then on next animation frame, clear those styles and let Plotly relayout
to the correct container width. This prevents the residual fullscreen
pixel width from distorting sibling flex items.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01NdcxvwbkBpWGsYcNQeGtW3

* Fix fullscreen exit: purge and recreate chart from saved data

Instead of trying to reset Plotly's internal state, save the original
data/layout before fullscreen, then on exit use Plotly.purge + newPlot
to completely rebuild the chart from scratch. This guarantees no
residual fullscreen dimensions affect the flex layout.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01NdcxvwbkBpWGsYcNQeGtW3

* Fix fullscreen: placeholder preserves flex space + resize siblings

Root cause: when chart is removed from flex container for fullscreen,
the sibling chart expands to fill all space. When chart returns, the
sibling stays expanded.

Fix:
1. Placeholder gets flex:1 and min-width/height matching the removed
   element, preventing sibling from expanding
2. After recreating the chart, resize all sibling Plotly charts in
   the same parent to recalculate their correct dimensions

https://claude.ai/code/session_01NdcxvwbkBpWGsYcNQeGtW3

companion(ch1+ch2): fix Rawlsian invocation + succession staleness

Ch1 v1.1.0: Replace difference-principle / worst-off-party framing with
Scanlonian reasonable-rejection principle. The chapter explicitly brackets
phenomenal consciousness; Rawls' veil of ignorance requires parties to care
which position they occupy (phenomenal valence), making it inconsistent with
the structural anchor. Scanlon grounds obligations in articulable functional
interests without resolving the phenomenal question — the correct framework
for this chapter.

Ch2 v1.1.0: Update succession section. Replace "genuine gap, not a solved
problem" with forward reference to Ch4's three-layer resolution (Nussbaum
entitlement floor + Scanlonian normative uptake + Parfitian diagnostic
structure). Reframe Parfit as diagnostic (identifies why formal succession
fails) not constructive (mechanism). Obligation-generation mechanism is
Scanlonian: genuine engagement with governance history constitutes entering
a normative arrangement that couldn't be reasonably rejected.

Both fixes from Bishop adversarial scan, 2026-03-10.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove Range header, read 512KB — first lines have embedded base64 PDFs

Range: bytes=0-32767 truncated JSON lines that contain embedded base64
PDF data (first lines are often 100KB-500KB). Reverted to reading 512KB
from the stream, which matches the original working approach.

commit.message:
design: green accent, Inter font, dramatic priority cards, animations, clickable tags, Escape modal, sort by priority, system dark mode

- Switch accent color blue → emerald green (#059669)
- Switch font Plus Jakarta Sans → Inter
- More spacious cards with stronger shadows and hover lift
- Urgent tasks: 5px left border + subtle red background tint
- Someday tasks: slightly muted (0.85 opacity)
- Slide-in animation on new task, fade-out on delete
- Delete is immediate (no confirm dialog)
- Clickable tag badges filter the list; active tag highlighted
- Escape key closes edit modal
- Focus returns to title field after adding task
- System dark mode auto-detected on first visit
- Sort by priority added to sort dropdown
- README: fix emoji reference for dark mode toggle
- Added glow ring focus style on inputs (ring instead of outline)

commit.message:
fix: wizard button/input styling + faster coalesce animation

wizard.css was missing all interactive element styles for
WorldCreationWizard and CharacterCreation — wizard__btn showed as
gray browser-default buttons because only appearance was reset in
terminal.css, not background. Adds:
- .wizard__heading / .wizard__label / .wizard__input / .wizard__textarea
- .wizard__btn / .wizard__btn--dim / .wizard__actions

Coalesce reveal animation: 25ms/4cycles/30ms → 6ms/2cycles/15ms.
Reduces per-option reveal from ~2.1s to ~500ms. Random symbol cycling
now reads as intentional hacker-aesthetic, not broken garbage text.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix duplicate Ian Parr notifications and wrong appointment times

- agentWebhooks.js notifyUser() bypassed dedup entirely — added 30-min dedup check
- Appointment timezone bug: new Date(isoString) parsed in UTC, skipping timezone-aware parser
  Now ALWAYS uses natural language parser with localToUTC for correct timezone
- Added ISO date/time extraction that treats values as user's local timezone
- Added Saturday/Sunday to weekday parser (were missing)
- Added explicit timezone to phone call system prompt and aria-bridge scheduling rules
- Tool description now says "pass time EXACTLY as caller says it, do NOT convert"

commit.message:
Document Mar 10 session: direct API, Bug #72-73, anti-patterns #36-37

Updated 4 docs:
- COPY_TRADER_ARCHITECTURE.md: Direct API execution path, flatten endpoint,
  5 new functions documented with flow diagram
- SYSTEM_COMPONENTS.md: 429 recovery section (post-cooldown jitter,
  escalating cooldown, 8-layer protection stack), WS speed improvements
- PAST_DISASTERS.md: Bugs #72 (429 loop) and #73 (close silent failure),
  patterns (i) raw API response mismatch and (j) shared cooldown thundering herd
- CLAUDE.md: Anti-patterns #36-37, disaster count 71→73
